access.label: οδική πρόσβαση και μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς
access.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα Αρετσούς τεκμηριώνει αστική ακτή μπροστά από την Καλαμαριά, με πρόσβαση οδικώς τόσο με ιδιωτικά μέσα όσο και με μέσα μαζικής μεταφοράς. Σημαντικό: το ίδιο προφίλ αναφέρει ειδική σήμανση που απαγορεύει την κολύμβηση.

amenities: ειδική σήμανση απαγόρευσης κολύμβησης σύμφωνα με το επίσημο προφίλ

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά

metadata.sourceNotes: Thessaloniki official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Aretsou bathing profile supports identity, Kalamaria urban location, road and public-transport access, sandy shore and seabed, shallow first-meter water with gentle seabed slope, unorganized status, WC, showers, waste baskets, municipal refreshment facility, eucalyptus vegetation, nearby marina context, and official signage prohibiting swimming. Confidence promoted to medium and officialWarningOverride set true so this coast is not recommended for swimming. No wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.
metadata.officialWarningReason: Official bathing profile notes signage that prohibits swimming at this coast.

The app-facing Milies label was left unchanged pending a later naming cleanup. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

metadata.sourceNotes: Thessaloniki official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Potamos bathing-profile PDF supports identity for the Epanomi cape coastal zone and explicitly identifies the shipwreck as a landmark east of the cape. It supports sandy shore/seabed, shallow first-meter water with gentle seabed slope, private-vehicle road access with some sections not passable by ordinary vehicles, organized services on parts of the wider coast, refreshment facilities mainly in the eastern section, and wetland setting around the broader area. The app-facing Shipwreck of Epanomi label was left unchanged for the landmark segment. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.
